meta.title: Farm Instinct — A strengths assessment for farmers
meta.description: Discover the instincts that make you a great farmer. 36 questions. Your archetype, trait profile, and the roles you were built for.

profile.title: My profile
profile.historySubtitle: Every time you complete the assessment, the result is saved here.
profile.empty: You haven't completed an assessment yet.

admin.title: Admin portal
admin.subtitle: Everyone who's signed up and what they've done.
admin.tableSubtitle: Click a row to see every assessment they've taken.
admin.userNoSessions: This user hasn't completed any assessments yet.
admin.pickSessionSubtitle: This user has taken the assessment more than once. Pick which one to view.
admin.rowClickHint: Click a user to see their full assessment results.
admin.ownerReportSubtitle: Manager-level briefing for hiring, role placement, and supervision decisions.
admin.ownerReportManagerSubtitle: How to get the best out of someone with this profile.
admin.ownerReportHiddenTruth: What this person doesn't say out loud
admin.ownerReportVsOthers: How they compare to others on your team
admin.ownerReportRoles: Roles unlocked by their trait combination
admin.ownerReportNoRoles: Trait scores didn't trigger a specific role recommendation. Lean on the archetype above.
admin.allThemesSubtitle: Full ranking with descriptions and tips.
admin.responsesSubtitle: Question-by-question transcript, in the order asked.
admin.pairedPrompt: Which one sounds more like you?

landing.tagline: Discover the instincts that make you a great farmer.
landing.subtitle: A strengths assessment built for the land, the herd, and the season. 36 questions. Your top 5 instincts with practical tips you can use tomorrow.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: Each one rates how much a statement sounds like you. About 8 minutes.
how.step2Body: Drive, Observation, Equipment, Reliability, Problem Solving, Animal Care, Strategic, Planning, Leadership.
how.step3Body: Your archetype, your trait profile, the roles you were built for, and what you'll struggle with — printable for your records.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your assessment.
auth.registerSubtitle: It takes less than a minute.
auth.errorInvalid: Email or password didn't work. Try again.
auth.errorExists: That email is already registered. Try logging in.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

assessment.title: Farm Instinct Assessment
assessment.intro: Answer honestly — there are no right answers. Pick what actually sounds like you, not what sounds good.
assessment.likertPrompt: How much does this sound like you?
assessment.pairedPrompt: Which one sounds more like you?

results.title: Your Farm Instincts
results.subtitle: These are the five instincts that came through strongest. Read them slowly — the tips are where the value is.
results.noResult: No results yet. Take the assessment first.

report.hiddenTruthTitle: What this really means about you
report.traitProfileSubtitle: How each instinct showed up in your answers, on a 0–10 scale.
report.strongVsWeakTitle: Where You're Strongest — And Where You're Not
report.ownersSubtitle: How to get the best out of someone with this profile.
report.noRoles: Your trait scores didn't trigger a specific role recommendation. The archetype above is still the strongest signal of fit.
